topics.title: Reflections on Iraq War Rhetoric
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding the embarrassment of past support for the Iraq War based on government claims of weapons of mass destruction.

topics.title: Nicole's Request for Bail Money
topics.summary: The studio handles a call from Nicole, who seeks $900 to pay her husband's bail after he was arrested following a high-speed chase.

topics.title: Nicole's Legal Fine and Webcam Work
topics.summary: The studio explores a caller's financial struggles, her work as a webcam model, and the specific legal reasons behind her $900 fine.

topics.title: Drug Use and Legal Issues
topics.summary: The show features a caller discussing the consequences of taking Xanax and Ambien before driving and the subsequent legal complications involving a probation officer.

topics.title: Persistent Sexual Arousal Syndrome Call
topics.summary: The studio hosts a caller who describes her experience with persistent sexual arousal syndrome before transitioning into a discussion regarding a logistical failure involving a limo service and a broken-down vehicle.

topics.title: Halloween Remake and Trivia Competition
topics.summary: The studio discusses a Rob Zombie remake of the Halloween film franchise before transitioning into a trivia contest regarding American history and the First Amendment.

topics.title: Historical Knowledge and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the lack of historical knowledge in comedy writing, personal experiences sharing a bed with a friend, and various listener interactions.

topics.title: Halloween Movie Production and Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with director Rob regarding his new Halloween film, covering its plot, cast, musical score, and his transition from the music industry to filmmaking.

topics.title: Rob Zombie Film and Music Industry Discussion
topics.summary: The studio discusses Rob Zombie's film career, the difficulties of the modern music industry due to piracy, and various listener emails regarding history trivia and upcoming radio partnerships.

topics.title: Sonos Audio Systems and Donkey Kong Records
topics.summary: The studio discusses the features of Sonos home audio systems, the search for a missing puppet, and the competitive world of Donkey Kong video game records.

topics.title: Video Game Culture and Upcoming Dates
topics.summary: The studio discusses the history of video game record-keeping and rivalries before transitioning into a humorous discussion regarding an upcoming date.

topics.title: Fitness Model Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with a nude fitness model who shares details about her career, physical appearance, and experiences in the modeling industry.

topics.title: Interview with Ariana Marie
topics.summary: The studio hosts an interview with Ariana Marie, who discusses her personal life, upcoming appearances, and her transition to a vegan diet.

topics.title: Current Events and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including dietary habits, local news reports on flooding and crime, celebrity rumors regarding Adam Levine and Mandy Moore, and a discussion on the filming of a Tom Cruise movie.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Current Events Review
topics.summary: The studio reviews various entertainment news items, including music critiques, film releases like "Mr. Bean's Holiday," and celebrity updates regarding Star Jones and Arnold Schwarzenegger.
